commands_run: coord claim "fourth-arm native TLS HTTPS carrier"
failure_reason: Lifted verified HTTPS body capture into the emitted fourth kernel http_get carrier without shell or Python runtime workarounds. The live probe source-compiled core, ran Go/Rust/TypeScript/fkwu against https://example.com/, and returned all-kernel verdict 63 with status=200 and 559 body bytes. fkwu uses runtime-loaded OpenSSL-compatible TLS for https:// and keeps plaintext DNS/TCP/socket/read/write for http://. The remaining fourth-arm gap is response-header row capture for production authority receipts.
